title: Fix stale detection bug — task-001/002 marked stale despite recent heartbeat
acceptance_criteria: Running `curl http://localhost:4310/api/vault/read-model` returns task-001 and task-002 with isStale=false (task-001 heartbeat_at is 2026-04-16T00:18:17.806Z which is recent)
task-003 with heartbeat_at 2026-04-15T09:20:00Z remains correctly detected as stale (over 24 hours old)
completion_summary: Split UI stale heartbeat detection from write-lock staleness and added focused regressions.
